nodes.name: observation
nodes.description: The observation table contains information on measurements other than lab tests e.g. blood pressure, height, and weight.

columns.name: observation_id
columns.description: Unique identifier for each observation in the dataset.

columns.name: person_id
columns.description: Unique identifier for each person in the dataset.

columns.name: payer
columns.description: Name of the payer (i.e. health insurer) providing coverage.

columns.name: patient_id
columns.description: Identifier that links a patient to a particular clinical source system.

columns.name: encounter_id
columns.description: Unique identifier for each encounter in the dataset.

columns.name: panel_id
columns.description: Unique identifier for the panel.

columns.name: observation_date
columns.description: Date the observation was recorded.

columns.name: observation_type
columns.description: Type of observation.

columns.name: source_code_type
columns.description: The type of code reported in the source system (e.g., ICD-10 code, NDC, lab, etc)

columns.name: source_code
columns.description: The code in the source system (e.g., the ICD-10 code, NDC, lab, etc)

columns.name: source_description
columns.description: Description of the source code in the source system.

columns.name: normalized_code_type
columns.description: The normalized type of code.

columns.name: normalized_code
columns.description: The normalized code.

columns.name: normalized_description
columns.description: Normalized description of the code.

columns.name: result
columns.description: The result of the record (e.g., lab test, observation, etc).

columns.name: source_units
columns.description: Source units of the lab test.

columns.name: normalized_units
columns.description: Normalized units of the lab test.

columns.name: source_reference_range_low
columns.description: The low end of the reference range from the source system.

columns.name: source_reference_range_high
columns.description: The high end of the reference range from the source system.

columns.name: normalized_reference_range_low
columns.description: The normalized low end of the reference range.

columns.name: normalized_reference_range_high
columns.description: The normalized high end of the reference range.

columns.name: data_source
columns.description: User-configured field that indicates the data source.

columns.name: file_name
columns.description: The file name of the source file.

columns.name: ingest_datetime
columns.description: The date and time the source file was ingested into the data warehouse or landed in cloud storage.

nodes.name: terminology__hcpcs_level_2
nodes.description: Seed containing HCPCS Level II codes and descriptions.

columns.name: hcpcs
columns.description: The HCPCS Level II code.

columns.name: seqnum
columns.description: The sequence number.

columns.name: recid
columns.description: The record identifier.

columns.name: long_description
columns.description: The long description of the HCPCS code.

columns.name: short_description
columns.description: The short description of the HCPCS code.

nodes.name: terminology__icd_10_cm
nodes.description: Seed containing ICD-10-CM codes and descriptions.

columns.name: icd_10_cm
columns.description: Alpha-Numeric ICD-10-CM Code.

columns.name: header_flag
columns.description: Indicates a diagnosis "header" with a 1. A value of 1 means the code is NOT billable for HIPAA covered entities, and is just included in the ICD-10-CM listing for organizational purposes. A value of 0 indicates the code IS billable for HIPAA covered entities and is a valid diagnosis code. It should be uncommon for codes in claims or clinical data sources to contain header values, but if you want to ensure you are not capturing non-billable codes, filter out all codes from this table where header_flag = 1

columns.name: short_description
columns.description: The short description of the ICD-10-CM code.

columns.name: long_description
columns.description: The long description of the ICD-10-CM code.

nodes.name: terminology__icd_10_pcs
nodes.description: Seed containing ICD-10-PCS codes and descriptions.

columns.name: icd_10_pcs
columns.description: The ICD-10-PCS code.

columns.name: description
columns.description: The description of the ICD-10-PCS code.

nodes.name: terminology__icd_9_cm
nodes.description: Seed containing ICD-9-CM codes and descriptions.

columns.name: icd_9_cm
columns.description: The ICD-9-CM code.

columns.name: long_description
columns.description: The long description of the ICD-9-CM code.

columns.name: short_description
columns.description: The short description of the ICD-9-CM code.

nodes.name: terminology__icd_9_pcs
nodes.description: Seed containing ICD-9-PCS codes and descriptions.

columns.name: icd_9_pcs
columns.description: The ICD-9-PCS code.

columns.name: long_description
columns.description: The long description of the ICD-9-PCS code.

columns.name: short_description
columns.description: The short description of the ICD-9-PCS code.

nodes.name: terminology__loinc
nodes.description: Seed containing LOINC codes and descriptions.

columns.name: loinc
columns.description: The LOINC code.

columns.name: short_name
columns.description: If exists, the short human-readable version of the LOINC description.

columns.name: long_common_name
columns.description: Clinician-friendly full LOINC description.

columns.name: component
columns.description: The substance or entity being measured or observed. Also called the Analyte. The first of six LOINC parts.

columns.name: property
columns.description: The characteristic or attribute of the analyte. The second of six LOINC parts.

columns.name: time_aspect
columns.description: The interval of time over which an observation was made. The third of six LOINC parts.

columns.name: system
columns.description: The thing upon which the observation was made. Also called specimen for laboratory tests. The fourth of six LOINC parts.

columns.name: scale_type
columns.description: How the observation value is quantified or expressed (e.g. quantitative, ordinal, nominal, etc.). The fifth of six LOINC parts.

columns.name: method_type
columns.description: A high-level classification of how the observation was made. Optional; only needed when the technique affects the clinical interpretation of the results. The sixth of six LOINC parts.

columns.name: class_code
columns.description: A code representing the general category of the LOINC term.

columns.name: class_description
columns.description: The general category of the LOINC term.

columns.name: class_type_code
columns.description: A code representing the top-level category for the test.

columns.name: class_type_description
columns.description: The top-level category for the test; Laboratory, Clinical, Claims attachments, or Surveys.

columns.name: external_copyright_notice
columns.description: External copyright holder's copyright notice for this LOINC code.

columns.name: status
columns.description: The status of the LOINC code concept. Active, Trial (experimental), Discouraged (not recommended), or Deprecated (should not be used).

columns.name: version_first_released
columns.description: The first release version of LOINC that included this code.

columns.name: version_last_changed
columns.description: The last LOINC version in which this record was changed.

nodes.name: terminology__observation_type
nodes.description: Seed containing observation types used by HEDIS/FHIR US Core, with an other category. https://terminology.hl7.org/1.0.0/CodeSystem-observation-category.html

columns.name: observation_type
columns.description: The type of observation.

columns.name: is_active
columns.description: Indicates if the SNOMED CT code is active.

columns.name: created
columns.description: The date when the SNOMED CT code was created.

columns.name: last_updated
columns.description: The date when the SNOMED CT code was last updated.

nodes.name: core__stg_clinical_observation
core__observation
nodes.description: The observation table contains information on measurements other than lab tests e.g. blood pressure, height, and weight.
nodes.sql:
{{ config(
     enabled = var('clinical_enabled', False)
 | as_bool
   )
}}

{%- set tuva_extension_columns -%}
    {{ select_extension_columns(ref('input_layer__observation')) }}
{%- endset -%}

{%- set tuva_metadata_columns -%}
    , obs.data_source
    , obs.tuva_last_run
{%- endset -%}

{% if var('enable_normalize_engine',false) != true %}
select
      obs.observation_id
    , obs.person_id
    , obs.patient_id
    , obs.encounter_id
    , obs.panel_id
    , obs.observation_date
    , case
        when ot.observation_type is not null then ot.observation_type
        else obs.observation_type
      end as observation_type
    , obs.source_code_type
    , obs.source_code
    , obs.source_description
    , case
        when obs.normalized_code_type is not null then obs.normalized_code_type
        when icd10cm.icd_10_cm is not null then 'icd-10-cm'
        when icd9cm.icd_9_cm is not null then 'icd-9-cm'
        when icd10pcs.icd_10_pcs is not null then 'icd-10-pcs'
        when icd9pcs.icd_9_pcs is not null then 'icd-10-pcs'
        when hcpcs.hcpcs is not null then 'hcpcs'
        when snomed_ct.snomed_ct is not null then 'snomed-ct'
        when loinc.loinc is not null then 'loinc'
        end as normalized_code_type
  , coalesce(
        obs.normalized_code
      , icd10cm.icd_10_cm
      , icd9cm.icd_9_cm
      , icd10pcs.icd_10_pcs
      , icd9pcs.icd_9_pcs
      , hcpcs.hcpcs
      , snomed_ct.snomed_ct
      , loinc.loinc
      ) as normalized_code
      , coalesce(
        obs.normalized_description
      , icd10cm.short_description
      , icd9cm.short_description
      , icd10pcs.description
      , icd9pcs.short_description
      , hcpcs.short_description
      , snomed_ct.description
      , loinc.long_common_name
      ) as normalized_description
     , case
         when coalesce(obs.normalized_code, obs.normalized_description) is not null then 'manual'
         when coalesce(
            icd10cm.icd_10_cm
          , icd9cm.icd_9_cm
          , icd10pcs.icd_10_pcs
          , icd9pcs.icd_9_pcs
          , hcpcs.hcpcs
          , snomed_ct.snomed_ct
          , loinc.loinc) is not null then 'automatic'
         end as mapping_method
    , obs.result
    , obs.source_units
    , obs.normalized_units
    , obs.source_reference_range_low
    , obs.source_reference_range_high
    , obs.normalized_reference_range_low
    , obs.normalized_reference_range_high
    {{ tuva_extension_columns }}
    {{ tuva_metadata_columns }}
from {{ ref('core__stg_clinical_observation') }} as obs
left join {{ ref('terminology__icd_10_cm') }} as icd10cm
    on obs.source_code_type = 'icd-10-cm'
        and replace(obs.source_code, '.', '') = icd10cm.icd_10_cm
left join {{ ref('terminology__icd_9_cm') }} as icd9cm
    on obs.source_code_type = 'icd-9-cm'
        and replace(obs.source_code, '.', '') = icd9cm.icd_9_cm
left join {{ ref('terminology__icd_10_pcs') }} as icd10pcs
    on obs.source_code_type = 'icd-10-pcs'
        and obs.source_code = icd10pcs.icd_10_pcs
left join {{ ref('terminology__icd_9_pcs') }} as icd9pcs
    on obs.source_code_type = 'icd-9-pcs'
        and replace(obs.source_code, '.', '') = icd9pcs.icd_9_pcs
left join {{ ref('terminology__hcpcs_level_2') }} as hcpcs
    on obs.source_code_type = 'hcpcs'
        and obs.source_code = hcpcs.hcpcs
left join {{ ref('terminology__snomed_ct') }} as snomed_ct
    on obs.source_code_type = 'snomed-ct'
        and obs.source_code = snomed_ct.snomed_ct
left join {{ ref('terminology__loinc') }} as loinc
    on obs.source_code_type = 'loinc'
        and obs.source_code = loinc.loinc
left join {{ ref('terminology__observation_type') }} as ot
    on lower(obs.observation_type) = ot.observation_type

{% else %}

select
      obs.observation_id
    , obs.person_id
    , obs.patient_id
    , obs.encounter_id
    , obs.panel_id
    , obs.observation_date
    , case
        when ot.observation_type is not null then ot.observation_type
        else obs.observation_type
      end as observation_type
    , obs.source_code_type
    , obs.source_code
    , obs.source_description
    , case
        when obs.normalized_code_type is not null then obs.normalized_code_type
        when icd10cm.icd_10_cm is not null then 'icd-10-cm'
        when icd9cm.icd_9_cm is not null then 'icd-9-cm'
        when icd10pcs.icd_10_pcs is not null then 'icd-10-pcs'
        when icd9pcs.icd_9_pcs is not null then 'icd-10-pcs'
        when hcpcs.hcpcs is not null then 'hcpcs'
        when snomed_ct.snomed_ct is not null then 'snomed-ct'
        when loinc.loinc is not null then 'loinc'
        else custom_mapped.normalized_code_type end as normalized_code_type
   , coalesce(
        obs.normalized_code
      , icd10cm.icd_10_cm
      , icd9cm.icd_9_cm
      , icd10pcs.icd_10_pcs
      , icd9pcs.icd_9_pcs
      , hcpcs.hcpcs
      , snomed_ct.snomed_ct
      , loinc.loinc
      , custom_mapped.normalized_code
      ) as normalized_code
   , coalesce(
        obs.normalized_description
      , icd10cm.short_description
      , icd9cm.short_description
      , icd10pcs.description
      , icd9pcs.short_description
      , hcpcs.short_description
      , snomed_ct.description
      , loinc.long_common_name
      , custom_mapped.normalized_description
      ) as normalized_description
   , case
         when coalesce(obs.normalized_code, obs.normalized_description) is not null then 'manual'
         when coalesce(
            icd10cm.icd_10_cm
          , icd9cm.icd_9_cm
          , icd10pcs.icd_10_pcs
          , icd9pcs.icd_9_pcs
          , hcpcs.hcpcs
          , snomed_ct.snomed_ct
          , loinc.loinc) is not null then 'automatic'
         when custom_mapped.not_mapped is not null then custom_mapped.not_mapped
         when coalesce(custom_mapped.normalized_code,custom_mapped.normalized_description) is not null then 'custom'
         end as mapping_method
    , obs.result
    , obs.source_units
    , obs.normalized_units
    , obs.source_reference_range_low
    , obs.source_reference_range_high
    , obs.normalized_reference_range_low
    , obs.normalized_reference_range_high
    {{ tuva_extension_columns }}
    {{ tuva_metadata_columns }}
from {{ ref('core__stg_clinical_observation') }} as obs
left join {{ ref('terminology__icd_10_cm') }} as icd10cm
    on obs.source_code_type = 'icd-10-cm'
        and replace(obs.source_code,'.','') = icd10cm.icd_10_cm
left join {{ ref('terminology__icd_9_cm') }} as icd9cm
    on obs.source_code_type = 'icd-9-cm'
        and replace(obs.source_code,'.','') = icd9cm.icd_9_cm
left join {{ ref('terminology__icd_10_pcs') }} as icd10pcs
    on obs.source_code_type = 'icd-10-pcs'
        and obs.source_code = icd10pcs.icd_10_pcs
left join {{ ref('terminology__icd_9_pcs') }} as icd9pcs
    on obs.source_code_type = 'icd-9-pcs'
        and replace(obs.source_code,'.','') = icd9pcs.icd_9_pcs
left join {{ ref('terminology__hcpcs_level_2') }} as hcpcs
    on obs.source_code_type = 'hcpcs'
        and obs.source_code = hcpcs.hcpcs
left join {{ ref('terminology__snomed_ct') }} as snomed_ct
    on obs.source_code_type = 'snomed-ct'
        and obs.source_code = snomed_ct.snomed_ct
left join {{ ref('terminology__loinc') }} as loinc
    on obs.source_code_type = 'loinc'
        and obs.source_code = loinc.loinc
left join {{ ref('terminology__observation_type') }} as ot
    on lower(obs.observation_type) = ot.observation_type
left join {{ ref('custom_mapped') }} as custom_mapped
    on  ( lower(obs.source_code_type) = lower(custom_mapped.source_code_type)
        or ( obs.source_code_type is null and custom_mapped.source_code_type is null)
        )
    and (obs.source_code = custom_mapped.source_code
        or ( obs.source_code is null and custom_mapped.source_code is null)
        )
    and (obs.source_description = custom_mapped.source_description
        or ( obs.source_description is null and custom_mapped.source_description is null)
        )
    and not (obs.source_code is null and obs.source_description is null)
{% endif %}

columns.name: observation_id
columns.description: Unique identifier for each observation in the dataset.

columns.name: person_id
columns.description: Unique identifier for each person in the dataset.

columns.name: patient_id
columns.description: Identifier that links a patient to a particular clinical source system.

columns.name: encounter_id
columns.description: Unique identifier for each encounter in the dataset.

columns.name: panel_id
columns.description: Unique identifier for the panel.

columns.name: observation_date
columns.description: Date the observation was recorded.

columns.name: observation_type
columns.description: Type of observation.

columns.name: source_code_type
columns.description: The type of code reported in the source system (e.g., ICD-10 code, NDC, lab, etc)

columns.name: source_code
columns.description: The code in the source system (e.g., the ICD-10 code, NDC, lab, etc)

columns.name: source_description
columns.description: Description of the source code in the source system.

columns.name: normalized_code_type
columns.description: The normalized type of code.

columns.name: normalized_code
columns.description: The normalized code.

columns.name: normalized_description
columns.description: Normalized description of the code.

columns.name: mapping_method
columns.description: mapping method used to populate the normalized codes and descriptions.  Can be manual (fields were populated in input layer), automatic (dictionary codes matching the source code were found and was automatically populated) or custom (populated by normalization engine)

columns.name: result
columns.description: The result of the record (e.g., lab test, observation, etc).

columns.name: source_units
columns.description: Source units of the lab test.

columns.name: normalized_units
columns.description: Normalized units of the lab test.

columns.name: source_reference_range_low
columns.description: The low end of the reference range from the source system.

columns.name: source_reference_range_high
columns.description: The high end of the reference range from the source system.

columns.name: normalized_reference_range_low
columns.description: The normalized low end of the reference range.

columns.name: normalized_reference_range_high
columns.description: The normalized high end of the reference range.

columns.name: data_source
columns.description: User-configured field that indicates the data source.

columns.name: tuva_last_run
columns.description: The last time the data was refreshed. Generated by `dbt_utils.pretty_time` as the local time of the `dbt run` environment. Timezone is configurable via the `tuva_last_run` var.
